paragraphs: Salt & Crème is a microbakery in Mountlake Terrace, Washington. Everything is made to order by one person.
The menu is small with intention. Each cake gets effort and time — real time — and that limits how many can go out each week. This isn't a limitation. It's the objective.
Our flavors are inspired by childhood experiences and our Cantonese & Asian culture and how it lives in the modern world today. We utilize both new and classic techniques in our desserts.
